ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Epsilon-Greedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created or introduced */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "time_iteration" INTEGER /* The iteration number or time step */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used in this iteration */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward obtained during this iteration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the iteration occurred */,
  "iteration_context" TEXT /* Context or scenario of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward obtained in this iteration */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* Rate of exploration used during this iteration */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the average reward */,
  "regret" REAL /* Regret or opportunity cost */,
  "cumulative_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward over all iterations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user involved in the session */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being tested in this session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., data scientist, product manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., user interactions, historical data) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, file, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm this configuration belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being configured */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Algorithm related to the action */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Iteration related to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User providing the feedback */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Algorithm the feedback is related to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session during which the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "algorithm1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first algorithm in the comparison */,
  "algorithm2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second algorithm in the comparison */,
  "winner_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* The winner algorithm based on performance */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., A/B testing, multivariate testing) */,
  "metric_used" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the algorithms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_winner_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_algorithm1_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm1_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_algorithm2_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm2_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, product manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user in the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User making the API request */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint being accessed */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time when the request was made */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was received */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the request */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., 200, 400, 500) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
